rules:
Each friendly Skybane Halo counts as a separate friendly Group for the purposes of its Aegis-X special rule. While this feature is deployed to a Dropsite, friendly groups treat the Dropsite as if it were a friendly Ship with Aegis-2 on the same Orbital Layer for the purposes of enemy close action and bomber attacks.
This Feature's Aegis special rule affects friendly Ships in Orbit in addition to Atmosphere.
